'''Swanze''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent and a member of the [[Sandwind group|Sandwind Team]] active on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Swanze spotted the [[Jundland Banshee]] at [[Nomad Gulch/Legends|Nomad Gulch]].<ref name="AIR" />

{{Char-stub}}
